pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 2.7.15 to align with Java 21 support and security patches.
Remove the explicit QueryDSL version property, likely due to dependency management changes or removal.
Add Google Guava library as a new project dependency.
Upgrade the ZXing JavaSE library version from 3.4.1 to 3.5.1.

.mvn/wrapper/maven-wrapper.properties.general_idea: Update the Maven Wrapper version to 3.2.0 to align with modern build tooling standards.
Update the bundled Maven distribution to version 3.9.4 to ensure compatibility with newer plugins and features.

mvnw.general_idea: Changed the Apache License URL from HTTPS to HTTP to match the standard template or resolve potential strict TLS issues in older environments.
Added support for loading system-wide Maven configuration from /usr/local/etc/mavenrc if it exists.
Removed extra whitespace in a comment URL for better formatting.
Replaced `which java` with a more robust command resolution method to handle shell functions and aliases correctly.
Upgraded the Maven Wrapper JAR from version 0.5.6 (Takari) to 3.1.0 (Apache) to align with modern Maven standards.
Added cleanup logic to remove the wrapper JAR file if the download via wget fails, preventing corrupted artifacts.
Removed trailing whitespace in the curl download section.
Added support for passing MAVEN_DEBUG_OPTS to the Java command line for debugging purposes.
Reformatted the JVM arguments for better readability by placing each system property on a new line.
mvnw.human_impl: Split long exec line into multiple lines for -D properties

mvnw.cmd.general_idea: Upgrade the Maven Wrapper JAR version from 0.5.6 to 3.1.0 to align with newer Maven standards.
mvnw.cmd.human_impl: Changed DOWNLOAD_URL to point to maven-wrapper-3.1.0.jar

mvnw.cmd.general_idea: Update the Maven Wrapper artifact path to reflect the change in group ID from io.takari to org.apache.maven.
mvnw.cmd.human_impl: Changed URL path from io/takari/maven-wrapper to org/apache/maven/wrapper/maven-wrapper

mvnw.cmd.general_idea: Update the path for user-defined pre/post scripts to use %USERPROFILE% instead of %HOME% for better Windows compatibility.
mvnw.cmd.human_impl: Replaced %HOME% with %USERPROFILE% in mavenrc_pre and mavenrc_post calls

mvnw.cmd.general_idea: Replace the direct exit command with cmd /C exit to ensure proper termination behavior in Windows environments.
Reformat the Java execution command to use line continuations for improved readability.
mvnw.cmd.human_impl: Split the %MAVEN_JAVA_EXE% command line into multiple lines using ^
